company.name: XBO.com
company.tagline: Cryptocurrency Exchange to Buy & Sell Crypto
company.mission: Empower people through crypto. Make digital currencies accessible to everyone.

exchange.name: Crypto Exchange
exchange.description: Instant swaps: fiat to crypto, crypto to crypto, crypto to fiat. No hidden commissions.
features: Up to 1% cashback depending on loyalty tier
Fiat on/off ramp via credit card and bank transfer

spot_trading.name: Spot Trading
spot_trading.description: Market and limit orders for real-time trading. Profit from price fluctuations.

futures_trading.name: Futures Trading
futures_trading.description: Trade on price shifts with up to 100x leverage. Long and short positions.
futures_trading.risk_warning: Futures trading involves significant risk. Leverage amplifies both gains and losses. Please ensure you fully understand the risks before trading.

earn.name: XBO Earn
earn.description: Earn up to 15% APR on crypto and stablecoins. Daily compounding interest.
features: Supported assets: USDT, ETH, SOL, MATIC, and more
Set duration options: 1, 3, or 12 months for higher rates
Real-time risk engine and strict collateralization
key_selling_points: Uninterrupted access to funds on flex terms

xbo_token.name: $XBO Token
xbo_token.description: Native utility token of the XBO.com ecosystem. Powers transactions, rewards, and exclusive access.

xbo_card.name: XBO Card
xbo_card.description: Spend crypto globally with instant fiat conversion. Virtual card integrated with Apple Pay and Google Pay.
features: Apple Pay and Google Pay integration
Unlimited virtual and physical cards for corporate clients

emoney.name: XBO.emoney
emoney.description: EU-regulated Electronic Money Institution product. IBAN accounts, EUR/GBP transfers, SEPA access.

cryptopayx.name: CryptoPayX
cryptopayx.description: Crypto payment processing for businesses. Accept 100+ cryptocurrencies with instant fiat settlement.
features: Instant settlements in EUR, USD, GBP
Secure refund processing in original crypto
awards: Best Crypto Payment Gateway — UF AWARDS Global 2025

corporate.name: XBO for Corporates
features: Unlimited virtual and physical card issuance

private_clients.name: Private Clients
private_clients.description: Personalized onboarding and strategic planning for high-net-worth individuals.

loyalty_program.description: Tiered loyalty program. Collect XP for actions, level up your tier, unlock better conditions.
loyalty_program.mechanic: Earn XP for trading, exchanging, and completing challenges in the Reward Center.

regulatory.status: Licensed and regulated in the European Union and other jurisdictions

disclaimers.general: The material presented is for general information purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, or a recommendation or solicitation to exchange, buy, sell, stake, or hold any cryptoasset, or to engage in any specific trading strategy.
disclaimers.risk: The volatile and unpredictable nature of the crypto-asset markets can result in the loss of funds. Digital assets are complex instruments that involve a high level of risk. Please ensure that you fully understand the risks before entering into any transactions.
disclaimers.geographic: Geographic restrictions may also apply. This information is not intended for distribution to, or use by, residents of certain countries or jurisdictions.
disclaimers.futures: Futures trading involves significant risk. Leverage amplifies both gains and losses. You may lose more than your initial investment.
disclaimers.uk: We do not hold a licence nor are registered in the United Kingdom, and do not actively offer services to UK residents.

argentina_football.strategic_value: Connecting with the passionate LATAM community. Strategic investment in one of the fastest-growing crypto markets globally.
argentina_football.content_angle: Sports + crypto crossover. LATAM audience engagement. Football culture meets digital finance.

differentiators: EU-regulated with MiCA alignment — trust and compliance advantage
Argentina Football Team sponsorship — unique LATAM/sports angle
Higher affiliate commission structure vs Binance — affiliates earn more per dollar traded
All-in-one platform: exchange, earn, card, payments, corporate, emoney
Mobile-first design — built primarily for smartphones
Curated coin selection reviewed by analysts — no junk tokens
$XBO native token with real utility (fee discounts, staking, rewards)

brand_voice.tone: Punchy, direct, human-sounding. Confident but not arrogant.
do: Use numbers and specifics (up to 15% APR, 100+ cryptos, 100x leverage)
Sound like a smart friend, not a corporate bot
dont: Use AI-style phrasing (delve, landscape, tapestry, leverage as verb excessively)
Use excessive emojis (1-2 max per post)
Sound generic or interchangeable with any other exchange
Make unsubstantiated claims about returns or guarantees

x.style: Hook-first. Punchy. One core idea per post. Thread for complex topics.

linkedin.style: Professional but not stiff. Insight-led. Question hooks work well. Paragraph breaks for readability.
linkedin.hashtags: None. Never use hashtags on LinkedIn.
linkedin.cta: Thought-provoking question or clear next step

instagram.style: Visual-first caption. Hook in first line. Educational or aspirational. Carousel-friendly.
instagram.hashtags: 5-8 relevant hashtags at end of caption
instagram.cta: Link in bio or engagement prompt

telegram.style: Community-first. Casual, energetic. Polls and questions drive engagement. News alerts for breaking stories.
telegram.cta: Direct link or community action (poll, prediction, discussion)

push_notification_rules.style: Ultra-concise. Action-oriented. Urgency or value hook. One clear CTA.

examples.title: USDT Earn: Up to 15% APR
examples.body: Put your stablecoins to work. Start earning daily interest now.

examples.title: BTC just hit $90K
examples.body: The market is moving. Open XBO.com to trade with up to 100x leverage.

examples.title: New: XBO Card is live
examples.body: Spend crypto anywhere with Apple Pay & Google Pay. Activate now.

weekly_x_plan.name: Weekly X Content Plan
weekly_x_plan.description: Generate 5 posts for X covering the week: 1 market commentary, 1 product highlight, 1 community/meme, 1 educational, 1 news reaction.
weekly_x_plan.prompt_prefix: Create 5 X posts for XBO.com this week. Mix content pillars: market commentary, product education, community engagement, and trending news. Each post should be under 280 characters, hook-first, and include a clear CTA.

feature_launch.name: New Feature Launch Pack
feature_launch.description: Full content suite for a product launch: 2 social posts per platform + 2 push notifications.
feature_launch.prompt_prefix: Create a launch content pack for XBO.com including: 2 X posts, 2 LinkedIn posts, 2 Instagram captions, 2 Telegram messages, and 2 push notifications. All content should announce the new feature, explain the value, and drive action.

earn_promo.name: Earn Product Promotion
earn_promo.description: Promote XBO Earn rates and benefits across platforms.
earn_promo.prompt_prefix: Create promotional content for XBO Earn highlighting up to 15% APR on stablecoins, daily compounding, flexible terms, and custodial protection. Include specific numbers and a clear CTA to start earning.

event_reaction.name: Market Event Reaction
event_reaction.description: Quick-turn content reacting to breaking crypto news.
event_reaction.prompt_prefix: Create reactive content for XBO.com responding to this market event. Be timely, add XBO's perspective, and include a relevant product CTA.

competitor_response.name: Competitor Response
competitor_response.description: Content that positions XBO against competitor moves.
competitor_response.prompt_prefix: Create content that positions XBO.com favorably against this competitor development. Focus on XBO's differentiators: EU regulation, LATAM/football angle, better affiliate rates, award-winning CryptoPayX. Do not mention the competitor by name.

partnership_spotlight.name: Partnership Spotlight
partnership_spotlight.description: Highlight XBO's Argentina Football Team partnership.
partnership_spotlight.prompt_prefix: Create content celebrating XBO.com's sponsorship of the Argentina National Football Team. Connect sports passion with crypto accessibility. Target LATAM audience.
